label: Raid strategy
description: Defines a tactical approach used by raids (e.g. immediate attack, siege, breach). Referenced by arrival mode and incident logic to determine how a raid is structured and scored.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# RaidStrategyWorker subclass that implements the raid strategy behavior and eligibility logic.

selectionWeightPerPointsCurve.label: Selection weight per points curve
selectionWeightPerPointsCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping incident points to the base selection weight for this strategy. Used as the fallback when no per-faction curve applies.

minPawns.label: Min pawns
minPawns.description: Minimum number of pawns this strategy requires. Raid points are divided by this value to compute the maximum pawn option cost, ensuring enough pawns can be generated.

selectionWeightCurvesPerFaction.label: Selection weight curves per faction
selectionWeightCurvesPerFaction.description: Per-faction overrides for the selection weight curve. When the raiding faction matches an entry, that faction's curve is used instead of selectionWeightPerPointsCurve.

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this strategy can only be used on tiles with one of these PlanetLayerDefs (Odyssey). Checked by RaidStrategyWorker.CanUseWith.

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs on which this strategy may not be used (Odyssey). Checked by RaidStrategyWorker.CanUseWith.

arrivalTextFriendly.label: Arrival text (friendly)
arrivalTextFriendly.description: Flavor text shown when a friendly group arrives using this strategy. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

arrivalTextEnemy.label: Arrival text (enemy)
arrivalTextEnemy.description: Flavor text shown in the raid letter when a hostile group arrives using this strategy. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterLabelEnemy.label: Letter label (enemy)
letterLabelEnemy.description: Label for the raid-alert letter shown when a hostile group raids using this strategy. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterLabelFriendly.label: Letter label (friendly)
letterLabelFriendly.description: Label for the letter shown when a friendly group arrives using this strategy. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

pointsFactorCurve.label: Points factor curve
pointsFactorCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping incident points to a raid-points multiplier. Applied by IncidentWorker_Raid.AdjustedRaidPoints after the arrival mode points factor.

pawnsCanBringFood.label: Pawns can bring food
pawnsCanBringFood.description: If true, generated pawns may carry food items. Read during pawn group generation.

arriveModes.label: Arrive modes
arriveModes.description: PawnsArrivalModeDefs eligible for this strategy. Used for strategy eligibility checks and arrival mode selection during the raid incident.

raidLootValueFactor.label: Raid loot value factor
raidLootValueFactor.description: Float multiplier applied to the total loot value generated for this raid strategy. Default 1 gives standard loot.

immediate-attack.label: Immediate attack
immediate-attack.description: Raid strategy where attackers move in and assault the colony right away.

staged-attack.label: Staged attack
staged-attack.description: Raid strategy where attackers stage before assaulting -- useful for sieges or delayed strike patterns.

siege-like.label: Siege-like
siege-like.description: Raid strategy requiring a minimum pawn count and typically restricted to specific planet layers.
